implementation.approach: local node configuration via DLLMD_P2P_DISCOVERY_MODE env var

discovery_mode.deferred: Private (no DHT participation) deferred to later milestone

publication.separate_keys: single forwarding key used; /dllm/node/v1 deferred until consumer exists

startup_guardrails.unlisted_plus_forwarding: rejected at startup with clear error

authorization.model: AuthView::authorize() is structurally independent of discovery mode
authorization.parameter: no discovery mode parameter exists in the auth path

files_changed.crates/dllm-transport/src/peer.rs: DiscoveryMode enum, PeerNodeConfig field, PeerDiagnostics fields, startup validation, split published flags, gated publication, 3 new tests
files_changed.crates/dllmd/src/main.rs: DLLMD_P2P_DISCOVERY_MODE env var parsing in peer_config()

new_tests.name: unlisted_nodes_do_not_publish
new_tests.assertions: unlisted node never sets published_discovery, never appears in DHT provider results

new_tests.name: unlisted_forwarder_rejected_at_startup
new_tests.assertions: start_peer_node returns Err for forwarding_enabled + Unlisted

new_tests.name: both_discovery_modes_enforce_authorization
new_tests.assertions: AuthView::authorize rejects unknown peer; authorization path has no discovery mode parameter

physical_validation: deferred to later milestone or on-demand VPS testing
